subtitle.ja: 輪を作り、左右の人差し指を入れます。元の輪に左右の親指を入れて両手を広げ、手のひらを上に向けます
subtitle.en: Form a loop and insert both index fingers. Insert both thumbs into the original loop, spread the hands, and turn the palms upward.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指を、向こう側に1回転させて糸をねじります
subtitle.en: Twist both index fingers once away from you.

subtitle.ja: 同様に、人差し指の糸を3~5回ねじります
subtitle.en: Twist the index-finger strings in the same way three to five more times.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指の手前の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the near index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指から、親指と人差し指を繋いでいる上の糸を残したまま、下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Keeping the upper strings that run between thumbs and index fingers, release only the lower thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 右手親指の糸を左手親指に、右手人差し指の糸を左手人差し指に移します
subtitle.en: Transfer the right thumb string to the left thumb, and the right index-finger string to the left index finger.

subtitle.ja: 左手親指の2つの輪を、右手親指と人差し指でそれぞれ取ります。左手親指を外します
subtitle.en: With the right thumb and index finger, take the two loops from the left thumb; release the left thumb.

subtitle.ja: 左手人差し指の2本の糸を右手で持ち、左手人差し指を外します。外した2つの輪を、左手親指と人差し指でそれぞれ取ります
subtitle.en: Hold the two strings on the left index finger with the right hand, release the left index finger, and place the two freed loops on the left thumb and index finger respectively.

subtitle.ja: 中央を斜めに交差する2本の糸を、左右の中指、薬指、小指で握ります。蝶の羽の形を整えて完成です
subtitle.en: Grasp the two diagonal central strings with the middle, ring, and little fingers of both hands, shape the butterfly’s wings, and show the finished figure.

subtitle.ja: 親指を開くことで蝶が羽ばたきます
subtitle.en: Opening the thumbs makes the butterfly flutter.
